commands.narrative:
## Roster

No roster changes since yesterday — identical 116-strategy roster (113 enabled, 3 disabled).

## Headline

The bot-excl-climbing family continues its multi-day accumulation run: **v28, v33, v32, and v25** all hold score=100 with every SOL-bar gate passing — the four strategies are promotable today. v33-bot-excl-climbing-ttp5 cleared the final gate threshold since yesterday's session and is newly eligible.

## What Accumulated vs What Bled (Today)

Today is a low-volume day — the graduation_rate_drop anomaly is flagged high-severity, and only ~1 trade per shadow strategy has been recorded so far (n_today=1, net_today=+0.027). The one confirmed trade on mint 5cuABuhQvDPsWFT... returned +5.3–9.1% across all bot-excl-climbing variants. On lifetime totals from leave-one-out: v25 (+6.67 SOL, drop3=+4.36), v28 (+5.69 SOL, drop3=+2.32), v33 (+3.85 SOL, drop3=+1.19), v32 (+3.69 SOL, drop3=+1.38) — all edge is genuine beyond their top-3 winners.

On the losing side: v42-breakeven-10/15/20 continue tripping breakeven stops at -3 to -5% (these strategies exit before the position gets to express its win tail), and v43-trailsl-be-1s shows the same pattern. The v39/v40/v41 cohorts (STRENGTHENING, n=38–81) are accumulating positively but n < 100 — watchlist only.

## Cross-Day Patterns (7-Day Scan)

v25/v28 bot-excl-climbing have topped the daily scoreboard for 7 straight days — this is not a one-day event. 2026-05-27 was the standout session (+1.43, +1.87, +1.49 SOL per strategy in a single day), and 2026-05-28 added +0.52–0.64 SOL/strategy. Both STRENGTHENING trend and regime stability (Panel 11) confirm this is not a decaying edge.

v10-best-double appeared in the top-3 on 2026-05-25 (+0.59 SOL) and 2026-05-24 (+0.59 SOL) — but this came from outlier wins. Its leave-one-out drop3=-0.78 SOL confirms the edge does not survive stripping the top 3. Do not be fooled by single-day wins; the lifetime picture shows no edge.

v14-sumabs-shadow is DECAYING (n=115, total=-1.06 SOL, drop3=-2.55 SOL, monthly=-1.47 SOL/mo) — three decay signals simultaneously. The kill proposal from 2026-05-27 remains the right call.

## Live Capital Concern (Escalated)

v25-bot-excl-climbing-live-micro recorded 3 more "Live buy failed to land" errors today (06:40, 07:17, 08:28 UTC), the same failure pattern flagged in ai-2026-05-27-007. Lifetime: n=179 live trades, total=+0.089 SOL, drop3=-0.246 (no real edge after outlier strip), monthly=+0.35 SOL/mo. This strategy is burning live capital on a lottery-ticket distribution. The kill recommendation is now more urgent than yesterday.

## Honest Self-Check: Edge Attribution

All four promotable strategies have top3_contribution_pct between 59–78% (their top 3 wins explain 59–78% of total gains). This is a fat-tail distribution — memecoins are definitionally fat-tailed. The right check is drop_top3, not top3_contribution_pct alone: **all four clear drop_top3 > 0** (ranging from +1.19 to +4.36 SOL), meaning the edge exists even after removing the lottery tickets. v28 at drop3=+2.32 SOL is the most robust; v33 at +1.19 is the thinnest but still positive.

v34-bot-excl-climbing-minlift (score=100 composite but NOT promotable) misses the monthly_drop_top3 gate: 3.609 SOL/mo vs threshold 3.75. It is one trade-day away from clearing. Recommend watching — do not promote yet.

## Operator Next Step

**Recommended priority:** (1) Execute the pending kill commands for v35-vel2050-holders10 and v35-vel2050-top10-40 — these are hemorrhaging at -14.76 and -10.31 SOL/mo respectively. (2) Decide on the v25/v28/v32/v33 promotions — all four are independently promotable to live. (3) Disable v25-bot-excl-climbing-live-micro immediately — live capital is at risk with no real edge after outlier strip.

anomalies.message: Low trade count today — graduation_rate_drop flagged. Only 1 trade per shadow strategy so far. May reflect market activity lull.
v12-vel2050-liq-dd15 DECAYING (n=58). Approaching kill threshold if trend continues.
v14-sumabs-shadow DECAYING (n=115, total=-1.06 SOL). INVALID — kill pending.
3 live buy failures today for v25-bot-excl-climbing-live-micro. Recurring pattern — 44 of 280 live trades failed (15.7%).

patterns: v25/v28/v32/v33 bot-excl-climbing family topped daily scoreboard for 7 consecutive days (2026-05-22 through 2026-05-29). Not a single-day event.
2026-05-27 was the strongest session: +1.43 SOL (v28), +1.87 SOL (v32), +1.49 SOL (v25) in one day.
v10-best-double appeared strong on 2026-05-24/25 (+0.59 SOL each day) but lifetime drop_top3=-0.78 SOL — confirmed lottery-driven, kill appropriate.

Breakeven stop strategies (v42-breakeven-10/15/20/30/40) consistently exiting early and recording losses. The stop-level calibration is cutting off winners before they express. Down-weight this cohort.
Live buy failure rate has been persistent: 44/280 (15.7%) over lifetime. v25-live-micro is the active live strategy — recurring failures suggest on-chain execution issue, not strategy signal.

All 4 gates clear: n=249, drop_top3=+2.323 SOL, total=+5.689 SOL, monthly=+17.65 SOL/mo. STRENGTHENING. Score improved from 87 to 100 since proposal. Originally flagged thin at drop3=+0.34; now +2.32 — concern resolved.

All 4 gates clear: n=207, drop_top3=+1.187 SOL, total=+3.847 SOL, monthly=+14.97 SOL/mo. STRENGTHENING. Newly promotable today — propose live promotion.

action_items.summary: Promote v33-bot-excl-climbing-ttp5 to live — newly all-gates-clear today. score=100, n=207, drop_top3=+1.187 SOL, total=+3.847 SOL, monthly=+14.97 SOL/mo. STRENGTHENING.

URGENT: Disable v25-bot-excl-climbing-live-micro — 3 more live buy failures today (06:40, 07:17, 08:28 UTC). Lifetime drop3=-0.246 SOL, monthly=+0.35 SOL/mo. Live capital at risk with no real edge. Escalated from ai-2026-05-27-007.
